name: The Gym Boxing & Fitness
addressFull: 2nd floor, Atara Mall Si Racha, Si Racha, Chon Buri 20110
hours: Open daily; Google Maps currently shows closing at 22:00

praise: Thai reviews from the two months before verification praise cleanliness, friendly professional trainers and clear zoning.
Reviewers describe activities for both adults and children and consider the service good value, without publishing a number.

sources.label: Google Maps current listing and Thai reviews
Operator Facebook linked from Google
sources.accessNote: Identity link recorded; no numeric tariff was captured.

confidenceReason: Only two source families; all membership/contract fields and air conditioning are unpublished.
